sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50113" key="i(eroteu/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἱερο-τεύκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n50113.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">temple-builder</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:4:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
